title: Granado Espada
description:
Актуальное
Character Encyclopedia now available on our Official Website!
Come take a look to know more about your favorite characters!

Об игреCharacteristics
• More than 200 game characters

• Active automatic hunting mode for gameplay support

• Control up to 3 characters simultaneously

• More than 300 extensive areas to explore

• Up to more than 3,000 different quests

• Over 3,000 types of weapons, armor and costumes

• More than 190 different missions, with over 7,000 types of regular monsters and over 100 types of raid monsters

• Real-time faction wars with Clique Battles, Colony Wars and other PvP and RvR contents

• Elegant, medieval Europe-inspired graphics

• More than 200 alluring background tracks
description_short: Granado Espada, the long-standing MMORPG beloved in dozens of countries around the world for its unique control system that allows you to take the role of up to 3 different characters simultaneously! Now available in English to Southeast Asia players, from imcgames.

upsells.name: Granado Espada Ailis region OST collection
